$comment: Catique HUB MCP tool manifest — ctq-112 / E5 round 1. Hand-authored for the five representative tools that round out the read-side MCP surface. TODO(ctq-112-manifest-gen): replace with an xtask-driven generator that derives tool entries from the `#[tauri::command]` signatures + use-case docstrings so the wire shapes can never drift from the Rust handlers (architect's R-3 follow-on).

tools.name: list_boards
tools.description: Return every board in the workspace ordered by (position ASC, name ASC). No arguments.

tools.name: list_columns
tools.description: Return every column ordered by (board_id, position). No arguments.

tools.name: list_mcp_servers
tools.description: Return every *enabled* registered MCP server as `[{ id, name, transport, url, command, authRefJson }]`. ADR-0007 registry-only mode: Catique HUB does not relay MCP traffic — the calling agent uses this metadata to establish its own session. Disabled servers are filtered out before they reach the agent. `authRefJson`, when present, is a *reference* to the secret (`{"type":"keychain"|"env","key":"..."}`), never the resolved value. No arguments.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: Return every task in the workspace. No arguments.

tools.name: get_mcp_server_connection_hint
tools.description: Return the connection metadata for one registered MCP server: `{ id, name, transport, url, command, authRefJson }`. ADR-0007 registry-only mode — Catique HUB never resolves the secret; `authRefJson` is the reference (`{"type":"keychain"|"env","key":"..."}`) the calling agent uses to look up its own credential. Errors with NotFound when the id is unknown.

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Look up a single task by id. Errors with NotFound when the id is unknown.

tools.name: get_task_bundle
tools.description: Resolve the full agent bundle for a task: the task row, its active role (task > column > board fallback), and the deduplicated origin-tagged prompt list ready for LLM assembly. ctq-112 round 1: returns the existing TaskBundle JSON. TODO(ctq-112-S5): wrap into the canonical XML serialiser when MCP-S5 lands.

task_id.description: Task id whose bundle should be resolved.
